hero.css: .hero_001 { position: relative; min-height: 100svh; overflow: hidden; isolation: isolate; color: #fff7e8; background: radial-gradient(circle at 18% 14%, rgba(255, 214, 145, 0.34) 0 12%, transparent 32%), radial-gradient(circle at 78% 18%, rgba(255, 143, 154, 0.22) 0 10%, transparent 31%), linear-gradient(135deg, #230b18 0%, #4d1230 39%, #8d3e27 72%, #d99a46 100%); font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; } .hero_001::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: -3; background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,.035) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,.035) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 54px 54px; mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0,0,0,.7), transparent 82%); } .hero_001::after { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: auto -12% -28% -12%; height: 58%; z-index: -2; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(255, 211, 132, .46) 0%, rgba(255, 211, 132, .13) 36%, transparent 68%); filter: blur(10px); } .hero_001 .hero_001__palace { position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: -1; pointer-events: none; opacity: .56; } .hero_001 .hero_001__dome { position: absolute; bottom: -4px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,237,190,.28), rgba(255,237,190,.04)); border: 1px solid rgba(255,231,176,.22); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.18); } .hero_001 .hero_001__dome--left { left: 4%; width: 24vw; height: 42vh; border-radius: 52% 52% 0 0; } .hero_001 .hero_001__dome--center { left: 34%; width: 34vw; height: 58vh; border-radius: 50% 50% 0 0; } .hero_001 .hero_001__dome--right { right: 3%; width: 25vw; height: 46vh; border-radius: 52% 52% 0 0; } .hero_001 .hero_001__arch { position: absolute; left: 50%; bottom: 0; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 52%; height: 74%; border: 1px solid rgba(255,236,180,.28); border-bottom: 0; border-radius: 44% 44% 0 0; box-shadow: inset 0 0 46px rgba(255,232,166,.08), 0 -18px 80px rgba(255,193,108,.12); } .hero_001 .hero_001__toran { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 116px; display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 12px; padding-top: 18px; pointer-events: none; } .hero_001 .hero_001__drop { width: 14px; height: 52px; border-radius: 999px 999px 70% 70%; background: linear-gradient(#ffd782, #f08a2c 58%, #b82445); box-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(255,196,104,.34); transform-origin: top center; animation: hero_001_sway 5.5s ease-in-out infinite; } .hero_001 .hero_001__drop:nth-child(2n) { height: 38px; background: linear-gradient(#fff1b7, #e24b48 68%, #6f1532); animation-delay: -1.2s; } .hero_001 .hero_001__drop:nth-child(3n) { height: 62px; animation-delay: -2.4s; } .hero_001 .hero_001__wrap { position: relative; z-index: 1; min-height: 100svh; width: min(1220px, calc(100% - 64px)); margin: 0 auto; display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.08fr) minmax(330px, .72fr); align-items: center; gap: 54px; padding: 128px 0 82px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; width: fit-content; padding: 10px 15px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,230,180,.34); border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(45, 8, 26, .32); backdrop-filter: blur(14px); color: #ffe8b9; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .22em; text-transform: uppercase; } .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow::before, .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow::after { content: ""; width: 30px; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #ffd782); } .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow::after { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ffd782, transparent); } .hero_001 .hero_001__names { margin: 24px 0 12px; max-width: 820px; font-family: "Playfair Display", "Cormorant Garamond", serif; font-size: clamp(76px, 10vw, 154px); line-height: .79; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -.07em; text-shadow: 0 18px 70px rgba(40, 0, 16, .44); } .hero_001 .hero_001__amp { display: inline-block; margin: 0 .03em; color: #ffd782; font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif; font-weight: 500; font-style: italic; transform: translateY(-.04em); } .hero_001 .hero_001__gujarati { margin: 0 0 24px; color: #ffdf98; font-family: "Noto Serif Gujarati", serif; font-size: clamp(18px, 2vw, 29px); letter-spacing: .02em; } .hero_001 .hero_001__message { max-width: 690px; margin: 0; color: rgba(255, 247, 232, .86); font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif; font-size: clamp(22px, 2vw, 32px); line-height: 1.34; } .hero_001 .hero_001__actions { display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 16px; margin-top: 34px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__button { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 54px; padding: 0 24px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,232,184,.42); background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffe2a1, #c96f2d 47%, #8b1537); color: #fff9ef; text-decoration: none; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: .16em; text-transform: uppercase; box-shadow: 0 18px 48px rgba(80, 10, 32, .35), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.55); } .hero_001 .hero_001__mini { color: rgba(255,238,201,.78); font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: .1em; text-transform: uppercase; } .hero_001 .hero_001__side { position: relative; justify-self: end; width: min(420px, 100%); } .hero_001 .hero_001__seal { position: absolute; z-index: 2; top: -54px; left: -44px; width: 138px; height: 138px; border-radius: 50%; display: grid; place-items: center; text-align: center; padding: 18px; color: #5a1730; background: radial-gradient(circle, #fff3c6 0 34%, #ffd782 35% 62%, #b94d2c 63% 100%); box-shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(45, 0, 20, .36); font-family: "Noto Serif Gujarati", serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.35; } .hero_001 .hero_001__panel { position: relative; padding: 34px; min-height: 548px; border-radius: 42px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,231,181,.33); background: linear-gradient(160deg, rgba(255,255,255,.18), rgba(255,255,255,.055)); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); box-shadow: 0 30px 90px rgba(34, 0, 18, .38), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.24); overflow: hidden; } .hero_001 .hero_001__panel::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,221,157,.24); border-radius: 32px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__panel::after { content: ""; position: absolute; width: 290px; height: 290px; right: -92px; bottom: -78px; border-radius: 50%; background: repeating-conic-gradient(from 8deg, rgba(255,224,150,.78) 0 6deg, rgba(255,255,255,.05) 6deg 12deg); mask-image: radial-gradient(circle, transparent 0 28%, #000 29% 58%, transparent 59%); opacity: .7; } .hero_001 .hero_001__date { position: relative; z-index: 1; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr; align-items: center; gap: 16px; color: #fff0ca; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .18em; font-size: 12px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__date::before, .hero_001 .hero_001__date::after { content: ""; height: 1px; background: rgba(255,224,160,.46); } .hero_001 .hero_001__day { position: relative; z-index: 1; margin: 46px 0 10px; font-family: "Playfair Display", serif; font-size: clamp(96px, 11vw, 142px); line-height: .82; letter-spacing: -.08em; color: #fff8e8; text-align: center; } .hero_001 .hero_001__month { position: relative; z-index: 1; margin: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffd782; font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif; font-size: 44px; font-style: italic; } .hero_001 .hero_001__venue { position: relative; z-index: 1; margin-top: 76px; padding: 24px 0 0; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,226,169,.25); } .hero_001 .hero_001__venue-label { color: rgba(255,238,202,.65); font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .2em; text-transform: uppercase; } .hero_001 .hero_001__venue-name { margin-top: 8px; font-family: "Playfair Display", serif; font-size: 34px; line-height: 1.05; color: #fff6df; } .hero_001 .hero_001__place { margin-top: 10px; color: rgba(255,245,224,.78); font-size: 15px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__events { position: relative; z-index: 1; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; margin-top: 26px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__chip { padding: 9px 12px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,226,169,.22); background: rgba(78, 13, 38, .24); color: rgba(255,244,220,.8); font-size: 12px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__rangoli { position: absolute; left: -108px; bottom: 46px; width: 210px; height: 210px; border-radius: 50%; background: repeating-conic-gradient(from 0deg, rgba(255,215,130,.68) 0 9deg, rgba(200,60,67,.45) 9deg 18deg, rgba(255,255,255,.06) 18deg 27deg); mask-image: radial-gradient(circle, transparent 0 18%, #000 19% 25%, transparent 26% 34%, #000 35% 56%, transparent 57%); opacity: .72; animation: hero_001_turn 28s linear infinite; } @keyframes hero_001_sway { 0%, 100% { transform: rotate(-2deg); } 50% { transform: rotate(2deg); } } @keyframes hero_001_turn { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } @media (max-width: 900px) { .hero_001 .hero_001__wrap { width: min(720px, calc(100% - 40px)); grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 58px; padding: 118px 0 54px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__side { justify-self: start; width: min(520px, 100%); } .hero_001 .hero_001__names { font-size: clamp(72px, 17vw, 124px); } .hero_001 .hero_001__panel { min-height: 460px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__seal { top: -38px; left: auto; right: -8px; width: 112px; height: 112px; font-size: 13px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__dome--left { width: 38vw; } .hero_001 .hero_001__dome--center { left: 22%; width: 56vw; } .hero_001 .hero_001__dome--right { width: 40vw; } } @media (max-width: 640px) { .hero_001 { min-height: 100svh; } .hero_001 .hero_001__toran { height: 88px; gap: 7px; padding-top: 12px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__drop { width: 10px; height: 38px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__wrap { width: calc(100% - 28px); padding: 92px 0 34px; gap: 38px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow { padding: 9px 12px; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: .16em; } .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow::before, .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow::after { width: 16px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__names { margin-top: 18px; font-size: clamp(58px, 21vw, 92px); line-height: .84; letter-spacing: -.055em; } .hero_001 .hero_001__gujarati { font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 18px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__message { font-size: 21px; line-height: 1.38; } .hero_001 .hero_001__actions { margin-top: 26px; align-items: stretch; } .hero_001 .hero_001__button { width: 100%; min-height: 52px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__mini { width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 11px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__panel { border-radius: 30px; padding: 26px 22px; min-height: 410px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__panel::before { inset: 10px; border-radius: 22px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__seal { width: 92px; height: 92px; top: -30px; right: 10px; font-size: 11px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__day { margin-top: 40px; font-size: 94px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__month { font-size: 34px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__venue { margin-top: 54px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__venue-name { font-size: 28px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__rangoli { left: auto; right: -82px; bottom: 18px; width: 168px; height: 168px; } }
hero.designNotes: A romantic royal-palace Gujarati wedding hero with deep jewel gradients, glass architecture, toran-inspired florals, rangoli geometry, Gujarati blessing text, and asymmetrical date/venue presentation for a premium first-screen experience.
hero.html:
Royal Gujarati Wedding

Kavya & Mihir

કાવ્યા અને મિહિરના શુભ લગ્નોત્સવમાં આપનું હાર્દિક સ્વાગત છે

With blessings of Shri Ganesh and our families, we invite you to celebrate a joyful Gujarati wedding filled with mehendi, garba, baraat, sacred pheras, dinner, music, and love.

Explore CelebrationsSomerset, New Jersey
